heading: Unlawful engagements void
label: 11107 Unlawful engagements void
text: An engagement of a seaman contrary to a law of the United States is void. A seaman so engaged may leave the service of the vessel at any time and is entitled to recover the highest rate of wages at the port from which the seaman was engaged or the amount agreed to be given the seaman at the time of engagement, whichever is higher.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource section (U.S. Code)1110746:578Section 11107 entitles seamen engaged contrary to any United States law to leave the service of the vessel without loss of wages.
